hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "^git commit|^git merge.*main"; then python3 scripts/validate_paradigm.py --pre-commit; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "^specs/.*\.md$"; then python3 scripts/validate_paradigm.py --spec "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'
